<style  type='text/css'  data-wpacu-inline-css-file='1'>
/*
Default CSS Styles for Same Category Posts plugin
*/
.same-category-post-current,
.post-date,
.same-category-post-comment-num {
font-size: 12px;
}
.post-title {
font-size: 15px;
font-weight: bold;
}
.same-category-post-current a {
font-weight: bold;
text-transform: uppercase;
}
.post-date {
font-style: italic;
margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.cat-post-author {
margin-bottom: 0;
}
.same-category-post-thumbnail {
display: block;
}
.same-category-post-thumbnail img {
float: left;
margin: 5px 10px 5px 0;
}
.more-link {
display: inline;
}
.post-entry {
overflow: hidden;
padding: 0 0 5px 0;
}
.same-category-post-comment-num {}
.same-category-post-item {
border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;
list-style: none;
list-style-type: none;
margin: 3px 0;
padding: 3px 0;
}
.same-category-post-item:last-child {
border-bottom: none;
}
.same-category-post-item:before,
.same-category-post-item:after {
content: "";
display: table;
clear: both;
}
/* CSS cropping */
.same-category-post-item .same-category-post-css-cropping span {
float: left;
margin: 0 10px 5px 0;
}
.same-category-post-item .same-category-post-css-cropping span {
overflow: hidden;
display: inline-block;
}
</style>

<style  type='text/css'  data-wpacu-inline-css-file='1'>
/*
Wordpress Popular Posts plugin stylesheet
Developed by Hector Cabrera
cabrerahector.com | @cabrerahector
Use the following classes to style your popular posts list as you like.
*/
/* Styles the "Sorry, no data so far" message */
.wpp-no-data {
}
/* UL - Popular Posts container styles */
.wpp-list {
}
/* LI - Post container styles */
.wpp-list li {
overflow: hidden;
float: none;
clear: both;
margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.wpp-list li:last-of-type {
margin-bottom: 0;
}
/* Styles for the popular post in view */
.wpp-list li.current {
}
/* Thumbnail styles */
.wpp-thumbnail {
display: inline;
float: left;
margin: 0 1rem 0 0;
border: none;
}
/* Title styles */
.wpp-post-title {
}
/* Excerpt styles */
.wpp-excerpt {
}
.wpp-excerpt:empty {
display: none;
}
/* Stats tag styles */
.wpp-meta, .post-stats {
display: block;
font-size: 0.8em;
}
.wpp-meta:empty, .post-stats:empty {
display: none;
}
/* Comments count styles */
.wpp-comments {
}
/* Views count styles */
.wpp-views {
}
/* Author styles */
.wpp-author {
}
/* Post date styles */
.wpp-date {
}
/* Post category styles */
.wpp-category {
}
/* WP-PostRatings styles */
.wpp-rating {
}
</style>
<style  type='text/css'  data-wpacu-inline-css-file='1'>
/*
Default style for WP-PageNavi plugin
http://wordpress.org/extend/plugins/wp-pagenavi/
*/
.wp-pagenavi {
clear: both;
}
.wp-pagenavi a, .wp-pagenavi span {
text-decoration: none;
border: 1px solid #BFBFBF;
padding: 3px 5px;
margin: 2px;
}
.wp-pagenavi a:hover, .wp-pagenavi span.current {
border-color: #000;
}
.wp-pagenavi span.current {
font-weight: bold;
}
</style>

<style  type='text/css'  data-wpacu-inline-css-file='1'>
/*
Theme Name: Humoybirra
Theme URI: 
Description: template for wordpress
Author: Iconoad
Author URI: www.Iconoad.com
Version: 1.0
Template for wordpress...
*/
@charset "utf-8";
/* CSS Document */
/* v1.0 | 20080212 */
html, body, div, span, applet, object, iframe,
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p, blockquote, pre,
a, abbr, acronym, address, big, cite, code,
del, dfn, em, font, img, ins, kbd, q, s, samp,
small, strike, strong, sub, sup, tt, var,
b, u, i, center,
dl, dt, dd, ol, ul, li,
fieldset, form, label, legend,
table, caption, tbody, tfoot, thead, tr, th, td {
margin: 0;
padding: 0;
border: 0;
outline: 0;
font-size: 100%;
vertical-align: baseline;
background: transparent;
}
body {
line-height: 1;
}
ol, ul {
list-style: none;
}
blockquote, q {
quotes: none;
}
blockquote:before, blockquote:after,
q:before, q:after {
content: '';
content: none;
}
/* remember to define focus styles! */
:focus {
outline: 0;
}
/* remember to highlight inserts somehow! */
ins {
text-decoration: none;
}
del {
text-decoration: line-through;
}
/* tables still need 'cellspacing="0"' in the markup */
table {
border-collapse: collapse;
border-spacing: 0;
}
/*(wpacu)(at)import url(/wp-content/themes/humoybirra/css/stylesheet.css);*/
@charset "utf-8";
/* CSS Document */
body {
margin: 25px 0px;
padding: 0px;
font-family: 'Raleway', sans-serif;
font-size: 11pt;
line-height: 15pt;
background:none !important;
}
html { 
background: url(/wp-content/themes/humoybirra/images/bg.jpg) no-repeat center center fixed; 
-webkit-background-size: cover;
-moz-background-size: cover;
-o-background-size: cover;
background-size: cover;
background-color: #222;
}
* {
margin: 0px;
padding: 0px;
}
a:link {
text-decoration: none;
}
a:visited {
text-decoration: none;
}
a:hover {
text-decoration: none;
}
a:active {
text-decoration: none;
}
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5 {
font-weight: bold;
}
/*estilos generales*/
html, body {
height: 100%;
}
#wrap {
min-height: 100%;
}
#contenedor {
margin: auto;
float: none;
width: 1200px;
padding-bottom: 550px
}
#container2 {
clear: left;
float: left;
width: 100%;
overflow: hidden;
background: #f7f7f7; /* column 2 background colour */
/*border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;*/
-webkit-box-shadow: 0 2px 6px 3px #262626;
box-shadow: 0 2px 6px 3px #262626;
margin-bottom: 45px
}
.fullWidth {
float:left;
position:relative;
width:100%;
}
.fullWidthAd{
float:left;
position:relative;
width:100%;  
}
.fullWidthAd img{
float:left;
position:relative;
width:100% ; 
}
.wpforms-confirmation-container-full {
float:left;
}
#container1 {
float: left;
width: 100%;
position: relative;
right: 302px;
background: #fff; /* column 1 background colour */
border-right: 1px solid #e0e0e0
}
#col1 {
float: left;
width: 896px;
position: relative;
left: 302px;
overflow: hidden;
}
#col2 {
float: left;
width: 302px;
position: relative;
left: 303px;
overflow: hidden;
}
/*estilos top*/
h1.logo {
width: 350px;
float: left
}
h1.logo img {
width: 100%;
float: left;
}
h1.logo span {display:none;
}
#navegacion {
width: 100%;
float: left;
background: #fff;
border-bottom: solid 1px #c0c0c0;
position: relative
}
#et-social-icons {
float: right;
width: 245px;
background-color: #f6f6f6;
-moz-box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 #fff;
-webkit-box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 #fff;
box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 #fff, -1px 0 0 #fff;
position: relative;
}
#et-social-icons li {
float: left;
list-style: none;
border-left: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
-moz-box-shadow: inset 1px 0 0 #fff;
-webkit-box-shadow: inset 1px 0 0 #fff;
box-shadow: inset 1px 0 0 #fff;
}
#et-social-icons li:first-child {
-moz-box-shadow: none;
-webkit-box-shadow: none;
box-shadow: none;
}
#et-social-icons .twitter .et-social-normal {
background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat 19px 22px;
}
#et-social-icons .twitter .et-social-hover {
background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat 19px 22px;
}
#et-social-icons .twitter a:hover {
background: #00ccff;
}
#et-social-icons .facebook .et-social-normal {
background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat 25px 22px;
}
#et-social-icons .facebook .et-social-hover {
background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat 25px 22px;
}
#et-social-icons .facebook a:hover {
background: #3f8eee;
}
#et-social-icons .rss .et-social-normal {
background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat 21px 22px;
}
#et-social-icons .rss .et-social-hover {
background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat 21px 22px;
}
#et-social-icons .rss a:hover {
background: #ff9110;
}
#et-social-icons .google .et-social-normal {
background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat 19px 22px;
}
#et-social-icons .google .et-social-hover {
background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat 19px 22px;
}
#et-social-icons .google a:hover {
background: #e84e18;
}
#et-social-icons .instagram .et-social-normal {
background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat 19px 22px;
}
#et-social-icons .instagram .et-social-hover {
background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat 19px 22px;
}
#et-social-icons .instagram a:hover {
background: #3f729b;
}
#et-social-icons a, #et-social-icons span {
display: block;
text-indent: -9999px;
width: 60px;
height: 64px;
position: relative;
}
#et-social-icons a {
overflow: hidden;
-moz-transition: all .5s;
-webkit-transition: all .5s;
-o-transition: all .5s;
transition: all .5s;
}
/*estilos col*/
#leftcol {
float: left;
width: 627px;
margin: 0px;
padding: 0px;
position: relative;
border-right: 1px solid #e0e0e0
}
#rightcol {
float: left;
width: 267px;
margin: 0px;
padding: 0px;
position: relative;
}
.cat-item-1 {display:none;}
.cuerpoinfo, .cuerpoinfo2, .cuerpoinfo3  {
width: 100%;
float: left;
padding: 0px 0px 15px 0px;
position: relative
}
.cuerpoinfo h2{
color: #333;
text-shadow: 0 1px 0 #fff;
font-size: 28px;
padding: 35px 0px 35px 100px;
position: relative;
background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
background-repeat: no-repeat;
background-position: 10px center;
}
.cuerpoinfo2 h2, .cuerpoinfo3 h2{
color: #333;
text-shadow: 0 1px 0 #fff;
font-size: 28px;
padding: 5px 0px 5px 65px;
position: relative;
background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
background-repeat: no-repeat;
background-position: 5px center;
margin-top:15px
}
.cuerpoinfo h2 b, .cuerpoinfo2 h2 b {
color: #f4a600
}
#blog h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#blog h2 b{color:#0067bb}
#autor h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#autor h2 b{color:#c1272c}
#bbq h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#bbq h2 b{color:#a80805}
#place h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#place h2 b{color:#009933}
#place h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#place h2 b{color:#009933}
#tag h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#tag h2 b{color:#5f3813}
#redes h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#redes h2 b{color:#9e005d}
#birra h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#birra h2 b{color:#f7921e}
#noticias h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#noticias h2 b{color:#14006b}
#blog2 h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#blog2 h2 b{color:#0067bb}
#tag2 h2{background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,) !important;}
#tag2 h2 b{color:#5f3813}
.cuerpocontenido {
float: left;
padding: 10px 20px 10px 20px;
margin: 0px;
width: 590px;
border-bottom: solid 1px #f5f5f5
}
.cuerpoimagen {
float: left;
margin-right: 20px;
position: relative;
line-height: 0;
width: 120px;
}
.cuerpoimagen img {
width: 100%;
height: auto;
border: solid 1px #e5e5e5
}
.cuerpodescripcion {
width: auto;
float: none;
margin: 0px;
padding: 0px
}
.cuerpodescripcion h3 {
font-size: 20px;
line-height: 20pt;
font-weight: 900;
color: #333;
margin-bottom: 5px;
padding-bottom: 5px;
margin-top: 0px;
position: relative;
}
span.cuerpodescripcion h4 {
display:none !important}
.cuerpodescripcion .artTime {
color: #fff;
background-color: #1754A5;
font-size: 9pt;
padding: 8px 14px;
display:none;
}
.cuerpocontenido:hover, .cuerpocontenido2:hover {
background-color: #f2f2f2
}
.cuerpodescripcion p, .cuerpodescripcion2 p {
padding-top: 0px;
color: #000
}
.viewmore {
margin: 10px 0px;
position: relative;
width: 100%;
float: left;
text-transform: uppercase;
text-align: center;
}
.viewmore a {
color: #1754A5;
padding: 8px;
}
.viewmore a:hover {
color: #000;
}
.cuerpocontenido2 {
float: left;
margin: 0px;
padding: 10px 10px 15px 10px;
width: 249px;
border-bottom: solid 1px #f5f5f5
}
.cuerpoimagen2 {
float: left;
margin: 0px 10px 0px 5px;
position: relative;
line-height: 0;
width: 70px !important
}
.cuerpoimagen2 img {
width: 70px;
height: 70px;
border: solid 1px #e5e5e5
}
.cuerpodescripcion2 {
width: auto;
float: none;
margin: 0px;
padding: 0px
}
.cuerpodescripcion2 h3 {
font-size: 18px;
line-height: 15pt;
font-weight: 900;
color: #333;
margin-bottom: 5px;
padding-bottom: 3px;
margin-top: 0px;
position: relative;
}
.cuerpodescripcion2 h3 a{color:#000}
.cuerpodescripcion2 h3 a:hover{color:#1754A5}
.cuerpodescripcion2 .artTime {color:#1754A5 !important; font-size:9pt; display:none}
.cuerpodescripcion2 h5 {color:#333 !important; font-size:8pt}
.cuerpoinfo2 ul {
width: 100%;
padding: 15px;
float: left;
position: relative;
list-style: none;
text-decoration: none
}
.cuerpoinfo2 ul li {
width: 100%;
padding: 3px 0px 10px 5px;
float: left;
position: relative;
/*background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
background-repeat: no-repeat;
background-position: left 5px;*/
margin-bottom:2px;
font-size: 11pt;
line-height: 13pt;
border-bottom: dotted 1px #c9c9c9
}
.cuerpoinfo2 ul li a {
color: #333
}
.cuerpoinfo2 ul li a:hover {
color: #1754A5
}
.cuerpoinfo2 ul li span {
clear: left;
color: #1754A5;
font-size: 10pt
}
/*estilos areas publicitarias*/
.adtop {
width: 720px;
float: right;
}
.fullad {
width: 100%;
float: left;
position: relative;
padding: 25px 0px;
text-align: center;
border-top: solid 1px #e5e5e5;
background-color: #fff
}
#rightad {
width: 100%;
float: left;
text-align:center
}
/*estilo breaking news*/
#news {
width: 100%;
margin: auto;
background-color:#e8da00;
position: relative;
float: left;
display:none
}
#newstitle {
color: #000;
text-align: left;
font-size: 12pt;
font-weight: bold;
padding: 7px 0px 7px 8px;
width: 18%;
float: left
}
#newswrap {
width: 80%;
float: right;
margin-top: 1px;
padding: 6px 10px 2px 0px;
color: #000
}
#newswrap a {
color: #000
}
ul#newsfront {
width: 100%;
height: 18px;
overflow: hidden;
margin: 0;
padding: 0;
list-style: none;
}
#newsfront ul li {
height: 1px;
padding: 5px;
margin: 0px 5px;
}
/*estilos footer*/
#footer {
position: relative;
margin-top: -380px; /* negative value of footer height */
height: 380px;
clear: both;
background-color: #333;
/* -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07), inset 0 5px 81px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75); */ -moz-box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07), inset 0 5px 81px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75);
box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.07), inset 0 5px 81px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.75);
border-bottom: 1px solid #0f0f0f;
}
/*Opera Fix*/
body:before {
content: "";
height: 100%;
float: left;
width: 0;
margin-top: -32767px;
/
}
#bodyfooter {
float: none;
margin: auto;
width: 1200px;
position: relative
}
#footerinside {
float: left;
margin: 25px 0px;
width: 100%;
position: relative
}
#textfooter {
position: relative;
float: left;
width: 100%;
padding: 0px 0px 2px 0px;
}
#textfooter p {
color: #fff;
font-size: 9pt;
font-weight: bold;
line-height: 14pt;
float: left;
padding: 5px 0px 0px 10px;
width: 100%;
display: block;
}
#textfooter p a {
color: #fff
}
#imagen {
float: right;
text-align: right;
position: relative;
width: 95px;
vertical-align: top;
margin: 0px;
padding: 25px 5px 0px 0px
}
.imgart{
width:100%;
height:auto;
display:inline-block
}
/*menu footer*/
#menufoot {
width: 100%;
float: left;
position: relative;
padding: 15px 0px 0px 0px;
border-top: solid 1px #fff
}
#menufoot ul {
list-style: none;
position: relative;
margin-right: -1px;
}
#menufoot ul li {
font-weight: normal;
text-decoration: none;
float: left;
position: relative;
}
#menufoot li a {
color: #fff;
font-size: 12pt;
line-height: 18pt;
font-weight: bold;
text-align: left;
padding: 0px 5px 0px 10px;
border-right: solid 1px #fff
}
#menufoot a:hover {
color: #02619B;
border-right: solid 1px #000
}
.divfooter, .divfooter2, .divfooterlogo {
width: 370px;
float: left;
position: relative;
margin-right: 25px
}
.divfooter2 {
float: right;
margin-right: 0px
}
.divfooter h3, .divfooter2 h3 {
font-size: 18px;
line-height: 15pt;
font-weight: 900;
color: #fff;
margin-bottom: 5px;
padding-bottom: 3px;
margin-top: 0px;
position: relative;
}
p.slogan {
color: #fff;
font-size: 18pt;
font-weight: bold;
line-height: 22pt;
float: left;
padding: 5px 0px 0px 0px;
width: 100%;
display: block;
text-transform: uppercase;
}
.divfooter ul, .divfooter2 ul {
width: 100%;
padding: 0px;
float: left;
position: relative;
list-style: disc;
text-decoration: none
}
.divfooter ul li, .divfooter2 ul li {
width: 90%;
padding: 3px 0px 10px 5px;
margin:0 0 0 20px;
float: left;
position: relative;
font-size: 14px;
line-height: 15pt;
color: #fff;
overflow:visible!important
}
.divfooter ul li a, .divfooter2 ul li a {
color: #fff
}
.cuerpocontenido3 {
float: left;
margin: 0px;
padding: 0px 0px 15px 0px;
width: 100%;
}
.cuerpocontenido3 h3 {
font-size: 14px;
line-height: 12pt;
font-weight: 900;
color: #fff;
margin-bottom: 5px;
padding-bottom: 0px;
margin-top: 0px;
position: relative;
}
.cuerpocontenido3 h4 {
font-size: 12px;
line-height: 14pt;
font-weight: 900;
color: #fff;
}
.cuerpocontenido3 p {
font-size: 13px;
line-height: 14pt;
color: #fff;
}
/*estilos adentro*/
#bodycontenido {
width: 600px;
margin: auto;
position: relative;
float: left;
display: block;
padding: 0px 15px 15px 15px;
min-height: 1150px
}
#contenido {
width: 100%;
margin: 0;
position: relative;
float: left;
display: block;
padding: 25px 0px 0px 0px;
}
#bodycontenido h2 {
position: relative;
padding: 10px 0px 3px 0px;
font-size: 25pt;
line-height: 28pt;
font-weight: 900;
text-align: left;
float: left;
width: 100%;
clear: both;
}
.barra {
position: relative;
padding: 5px 0px 5px 0px;
vertical-align: top;
float: left;
width: 100%;
border-bottom: solid 1px #cdcdcd;
border-top: solid 1px #cdcdcd;
}
.fecha {
vertical-align: top;
color: #333;
float: right;
width: 35%;
font-size: 12pt;
text-align: right;
font-style: italic;
}
.imagencentral{	float: left;
width: 100%;position:relative;padding:0px;margin:0px}
.imagencentral img{	float: left;
width: 100%;position:relative;padding:0px;margin:0px;height:auto}
#link, #tags{
width:100%;
float:left;
padding:5px 0px;
font-size:8pt;
}
#link{width:35%;
float:right;text-align:right}
#link a, #tags a{ color:#1754A5}
#link a:hover, #tags a:hover{ color:#333}
/*#tags a{ padding:5px; margin-left:5px;color:#fff;text-align:center;background-color:#1754A5}
#tags a:hover{background-color:#333}*/
/*breadcrumbs*/
.breadcrumbs {
width: 48%;
position: relative;
float: left;
padding: 0px
}
status {
float: right
}
.breadcrumbs ul {
margin: 0px;
text-align: justify;
padding: 0px;
list-style: none !important;
float: left;
position: relative;
width: 100%;
}
.breadcrumbs ul li {
padding: 0px 5PX 0px 0px;
text-decoration: none;
color: #333;
list-style: none;
float: left;
font-size: 10pt;
font-stretch: extra-expanded;
font-weight: normal;
list-style: none !important;
text-decoration: none
}
.breadcrumbs li a {
color: #1754A5;
}
.breadcrumbs li a:hover {
color: #333
}
#contenido p {
position: relative;
padding: 5px 0px 15px 0px;
vertical-align: top;
color: #333;
float: left;
font-size: 12pt;
text-align: justify;
line-height: 18pt;
width: 100%;
}
.wp-block-image img{ width:100%; height:auto !important; text-align:center}
/*#contenido p:first-child:first-letter {
font-size: 50px;
float: left;
padding: 5px 0px 0px 0px;
height: 30px;
margin-right: 10px;
color: #1754A5;
line-height: 30px;
}*/
#contenido h3 {
color: #333;
font-size: 16pt;
line-height: 20pt;
float: left;
width: 100%;
padding: 25px 0px 5px 0px;
border-bottom: dotted 1px #333
}
#contenido h4 {
color: #000;
font-size: 12pt;
line-height: 18pt;
float: left;
width: 100%;
padding: 10px 0px 1px 0px;
}
#contenido ul, #contenido ol {
width: 95%;
font-size: 12pt;
text-align: justify;
line-height: 18pt;
margin: 0px;
color: #333;
padding: 8px 0px;
margin-left: 25px;
list-style: none;
float: left;
position: relative
}
#contenido ul li, #contenido ol li {
padding: 0px 0px 5px 5px;
text-decoration: none;
list-style: disc
}
#contenido ol li {
list-style: decimal
}
.slideshowlink{
float: right;
width: 100%;
text-align: right;
padding: 8px 0;}
.slideshowlink a{
color:#000} 
.slideshowlink a:hover{
color:#a5a5a5} 
#discusion{
width: 95% !important;
margin: auto  !important;
}
.same-category-post-thumbnail img {
width: 100%;
height: auto;
}
#bgmp_map-canvas{width:100% !important}
.rwp-rating-form-user-info {width:45px}
blockquote{
display:block;
padding: 15px 0px;
float:left;
margin: 5 0;
position: relative;
/*Font*/
font-family: Georgia, serif;
font-size: 16px;
line-height: 1.2;
color: #666;
text-align: center;
width: 100%;
background-image: url(data:image/jpeg;base64,);
background-repeat: no-repeat;
background-position: center top; 
}
blockquote::before{
content: ""; 
/*Font*/
font-family: Georgia, serif;
font-size: 60px;
font-weight: bold;
color: #999;
/*Positioning*/
position: absolute;
left: 10px;
top:5px;
}
blockquote::after{
/*Reset to make sure*/
content: "";
background-image: url(data:image/jpeg;base64,);
background-repeat: no-repeat;
background-position: center top;
margin-top: 15px;
display: inline-block;
width: 320px;
height: 1px;
}
blockquote p{
color: #ffb81f !important;
font-size: 25px !important;
line-height: 33px !important;
text-align: center !important
}
blockquote a{
text-decoration: none;
background: #eee;
cursor: pointer;
padding: 0 3px;
color: #c76c0c;
}
blockquote a:hover{
color: #666;
}
blockquote em{
font-style: italic;
}
h3.nr_title{
color: #1754A5;
font-size: 16pt;
line-height: 20pt;
float: left;
width: 100%;
padding: 25px 0px 5px 0px;
border-bottom: solid 1px #e0e0e0;
}
.nrelate_default .nr_post_title {
font-weight: bold;
}
.nr_inner ul {
width: 95%;
font-size: 12pt;
text-align: justify;
line-height: 18pt;
margin: 0px;
color: #333;
padding: 8px 0px;
margin-left: 25px;
list-style: none;
float: left;
position: relative
}
.nr_inner ul li {
padding: 0px 0px 5px 5px;
text-decoration: none;
list-style: disc}
.nr_inner ul li a{
color:#333}
.nr_inner ul li a:hover{
color:#1754A5}
.pointelle-meta {
display: none!important
}
div.pointelle-active h2 {
background-image: none!important
}
/*clases 404*/
#error404 {
float: left;

}

font-size: 45px
}

color: #333;
padding: 15px 0px;

}
#error404 span {
width: 100%;

padding: 15px 0px;
}
a.volver {
text-transform: uppercase;
font-size: 14px;
color: #ffffff;
padding: 10px 20px;
background: -moz-linear-gradient( top, #1d71e0 0%, #1755a5);
background: -webkit-gradient( linear, left top, left bottom, from(#1d71e0), to(#1755a5));
-moz-border-radius: 6px;
-webkit-border-radius: 6px;
border-radius: 6px;
border: 1px solid #1755a5;
-moz-box-shadow: 0px 1px 3px rgba(84,84,84,0.5), inset 0px 0px 1px rgba(255,255,255,1);
-webkit-box-shadow: 0px 1px 3px rgba(84,84,84,0.5), inset 0px 0px 1px rgba(255,255,255,1);
box-shadow: 0px 1px 3px rgba(84,84,84,0.5), inset 0px 0px 1px rgba(255,255,255,1);
text-shadow: 0px -1px 0px rgba(000,000,000,0.7), 0px 1px 0px rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
}
a.volver:hover {
background: -moz-linear-gradient( top, #1d71e0 0%, #000000);
background: -webkit-gradient( linear, left top, left bottom, from(#1d71e0), to(#000000));
}

}
